message.content:
@startuml
title AU2048 Demo Mode Button Sequence Diagram

actor "User" as User
participant "MainActivity" as MainActivity
participant "Controller" as Controller
participant "MainActivityFragment" as MainActivityFragment
participant "BoardView" as BoardView
database "Model" as Model

User -> MainActivity: Starts App
activate MainActivity
MainActivity -> Controller: onCreate()
activate Controller
Controller -> MainActivityFragment: onCreate()
activate MainActivityFragment
MainActivityFragment -> BoardView: onCreateView()
activate BoardView

loop [wantstoContinue == true]
  User -> MainActivity: Press Demo Mode
  activate MainActivity
  MainActivity -> Controller: ResetClick(View)
  activate Controller
  Controller -> Controller: reset()
  Controller -> Model: setArr()
  Controller -> Model: setScore()
  Controller -> MainActivityFragment: doesWantToContinue()
  deactivate Controller
  MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment: setupArrView()
  MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment: setArrView()
  MainActivityFragment -> BoardView: onCreateView()
  BoardView --> MainActivityFragment: BoardView
  deactivate BoardView

  alt [demo == true]
    alt [button_direction == up]
      Controller -> Controller: UpClick(View)
    end
    alt [button_direction == left]
      Controller -> Controller: LeftClick(View)
    end
    alt [button_direction == down]
      Controller -> Controller: DownClick(View)
    end
    alt [button_direction == right]
      Controller -> Controller: RightClick(View)
    end

    alt [button_direction == up]
      Controller -> Controller: shiftUp()
    end
    alt [button_direction == left]
      Controller -> Controller: shiftLeft()
    end
    alt [button_direction == down]
      Controller -> Controller: shiftDown()
    end
    alt [button_direction == right]
      Controller -> Controller: shiftRight()
    end

    Controller -> Model: setArr()
    Controller -> Model: setScore()
    Controller -> MainActivityFragment: doesWantToContinue()
    MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment: setupArrView()
    MainActivity -> MainActivityFragment: setArrView()
    MainActivityFragment -> BoardView: onCreateView()
    BoardView --> MainActivityFragment: BoardView
    deactivate BoardView

    alt [noMovesPossible == false]
      Controller -> Controller: checkWin()
      Controller -> Controller: win()
      Controller -> Controller: reset()
    end
    alt [noMovesPossible == true]
      Controller -> Controller: noMovesPossible()
      Controller -> Controller: gameover()
      Controller -> MainActivityFragment: Action.DOWN
      Controller -> Controller: reset()
    end
  end

  deactivate MainActivity
  MainActivity -> MainActivity: onDestroy()
  MainActivityFragment -> MainActivityFragment: onDestroy()
  BoardView --> BoardView: X
  deactivate MainActivityFragment
  deactivate MainActivity
end

@enduml
